name: Play-Doh Kitchen Creations Colorful Cafe Kids Kitchen Playset
description:
Get imaginations brewing with the Colorful Cafe Playset! This pretend play cafe set lets kids imagine creative Play-Doh drinks their way. Make the pretend coffee maker for kids fill the cups with colorful Play-Doh modeling compound, then spin and slide them to the topping station and add pretend whipped cream. Whether they're creating Play-Doh coffee, tea, frappes, or pretend smoothies, kids can have fun playing barista again and again. This Kitchen Creations coffee toy comes with 5 different Play-Doh colors in 2-ounce cans to perk up their imaginations. Add these kitchen toys for 3 year old girls and boys to your Play-Doh toys collection. Play-Doh kids play kitchen sets and kids arts and crafts sets make great gifts for girls and boys.

Hasbro, Play-Doh, and all related properties are trademarks of Hasbro.



Includes cafe playset, mug, 3 clear frappe cups, 2 frappe cup lids, spoon, and 5 cans of Play-Doh Brand Modeling Compound (net weight 10 oz/284 g).

Ages 3 years and up
Not intended to be eaten.
Notice to Parents: Contains Wheat.
Non-Toxic. Conforms to: ASTM D-4236.
Molded results vary depending on child’s age and level of skill.
Adult assembly required.
Product and colors will vary.
